positive: A charming, vintage sticker sheet illustration featuring various anthropomorphic coffee beans, espresso cups, and latte art designs. Cute, flat graphic design style, limited color palette (browns, creams, terracotta), perfect for repeat pattern printing, kawaii aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, complex shading, messy background
